ksa_text: Knowledge of organizational change management principles as applied to large-scale data and AI transformation programs, including adoption barriers, culture change levers, and executive sponsorship requirements.

pass_3_adversarial_internal.challenge: Exclude on Leadership and Strategy (in-scope prior) KSA with composite 0.422 and only 1 OOS signal(s). Similarly scored LS KSAs are typically included.
pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: Exclude upheld. Insufficient core signals (0) or excess OOS signals (1).

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: Does market evidence challenge the exclusion of this Leadership and Strategy KSA (composite 0.422)?
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: Market analysis of Data Monetization Manager job postings does not surface this Leadership and Strategy competency as a standard requirement at the relevant level. Exclusion consistent with role focus.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: Exclusion upheld. Market evidence consistent with exclusion. Final decision: exclude.
